title: ericoides deflexum
intro: Ericoides deflexum, also known as the twisted heath, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to Australia's eastern coast, characterized by its small, white or pink flowers and twisted, wiry stems. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ericoides deflexum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it potentially useful in treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
